name: Shiranui Spectralsword Shade
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>逢</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ノ<ruby lang="jp"><rb>妖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>よう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>刀</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>とう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>不知火</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しらぬい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: You can Tribute this card, then target 2 of your banished Zombie monsters, except "Shiranui Spectralsword Shade", including a "Shiranui" monster; Special Summon them in Defense Position, but negate their effects, also, you cannot Special Summon monsters for the rest of this turn, except Zombie monsters. You can only use this effect of "Shiranui Spectralsword Shade" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can Tribute this card, then target 2 of your banished Zombie monsters, except "Shiranui Spectralsword Shade", including a "Shiranui" monster; Special Summon them in Defense Position, but negate their effects, also, you cannot Special Summon monsters for the rest of this turn, except Zombie monsters. You can only use this effect of "Shiranui Spectralsword Shade" once per turn.
eff: You can Tribute this card, then target 2 of your banished Zombie monsters, except "Shiranui Spectralsword Shade", including a "Shiranui" monster; Special Summon them in Defense Position, but negate their effects, also, you cannot Special Summon monsters for the rest of this turn, except Zombie monsters. You can only use this effect of "Shiranui Spectralsword Shade" once per turn.

mst: Negates the effects of the Summoned monsters
summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons to Type specific monsters
